content:
Post 1

ASX 200 barely moved — up 2.00pts to 8,793.30 — but underneath, tech surged +3.26% while healthcare bled -1.05%. Flat index, violent rotation. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 2

📈 IT led all sectors +3.26%, materials added +1.33%. 📉 Healthcare fell -1.05%, telcos -0.87%, financials -0.71%. Classic risk rotation — growth in, defensives out. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 3

NXT jumped +7.74% to AUD 14.06, the session's standout. Data centre demand narrative running hot. S32 added +6.62% to AUD 4.35. HLI was the wreckage, down -10.11%. #ASX #mining

Post 4

🪙 Gold at AUD 5,812.67/oz keeping miners bid. Silver AUD 84.56/oz, platinum AUD 2,406.88/oz. AUD/USD at 0.7011. Metals complex giving materials bulls something to work with. #gold #metals #ausbiz

Post 5

Watch gold at AUD 5,812/oz — holds above this and miners stay supported. AUD/USD 0.7011 is the FX line. Does IT extend its +3.26% lead or does rotation reverse? What's your call? #ASX #ausbiz
